text: 課題５：<yellow>ギアを１段階以上ためてフォトンアーツ発動
パルチザンギアについて

・<%WeaponAction>や通常攻撃後の
　「舞」でギア１段階以上ためる
・<%PhotonArts>でフォトンアーツを発動

・<%MainPaletteC>や通常攻撃後の
　「舞」でギア１段階以上ためる
・<%PhotonArts>でフォト
Training 5: <yellow>Raise your Focus to one or higher and use a Photon Art

-Use a Flourish after a <%WeaponAction> or Normal
Attack and raise your Focus to one or higher
-Fire off a Photon Art with <%PhotonArts>

-Use a Flourish after a <%MainPaletteC> or Normal
Attack and raise your Focus to one or higher
-Fire off a Photon Art with <%PhotonArts>
